name: Hostess Twinkies
recipeIngredient: 1 package Golden pound cake mix (16 oz)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit. Fold 12 pieces of aluminum foil into a compact shape, about 4 inches tall.
Wrap the folded foil around a small spice bottle to create a mold. Leave the top of the mold open for pouring batter.
Arrange the molds on a cookie sheet or in a shallow pan.
Disregard the directions on the box of cake mix. Beat the egg whites until stiff. Combine them with the cake mix and water, then beat until thoroughly blended about 2 minutes.
Pour the batter into the molds, filling each one about 3/4 inch.
Bake for about 30 minutes or until the cakes are golden brown and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
For the filling, cream the butter and shortening. Slowly add the sugars while beating. Add the evaporated milk, vanilla, and lemon extract. Mix on medium speed until completely smooth and fluffy.
When the cakes are done and cooled, use a toothpick to make three small holes in the bottom of each one. Weave the toothpick around the inside of each cake to create space for the filling.
Using a cake decorator or plastic bag or pastry bag, inject each cake with filling through all three holes.
